title: README evidence DB atlas vs public preview boundary
problem: Ticket-312 documents fixture-mode public preview refresh; README Evidence DB atlas section (294-298) does not state that non-fixture exports remain operator-private and do not publish to /atlas-preview.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence DB atlas section cross-links Research Atlas public preview fixture refresh runbook.
Explicit boundary: non-fixture evidence DB atlas exports are operator-private; public /atlas-preview uses committed fixture-mode refresh only.
No CLI or export semantic changes.
non_goals: Live evidence DB to public site pipeline.
